FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions here.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: It depends on the scope. Contact us and we'll provide a time estimate based on your needs.

items.question: What does it cost?
items.answer: We tailor quotes to your needs. Contact us for a free assessment.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes, we offer support and follow-up to ensure everything works as expected.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Reach out via the contact form and we'll take it from there.

sections.title: What data do we collect?
sections.content: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through our contact forms, such as name, email address, and phone number.

sections.title: How do we use your data?
sections.content: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry and improve our service. We never sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to improve your experience. Analytical cookies (Google Analytics) are only activated after your consent. We also use cookie-free analytics tools that do not require consent.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to request access to, correction, or deletion of your personal data. Contact us to exercise your rights.

CookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze traffic.
